title: The Haunting in Connecticut 2: Ghosts of Georgia
original_title: The Haunting in Connecticut 2: Ghosts of Georgia
overview: A young family moves into a historic home in Georgia, only to learn they are not the house's only inhabitants. Soon they find themselves in the presence of a secret rising from underground and threatening to bring down anyone in its path.
